name: Hypnotist
ability: Each night*, choose a player, a character & alignment they think they become.
flavor: Five, three, four, two, zero, one. Three, five, two, four, one, zero. It is 11:59 PM. Now, it is 12:00 AM. (v1.3)
firstNightReminder: The Hypnotist chooses a player & a character & alignment. Put the Hypnotist to sleep. Wake the target. Show the *YOU ARE* token & the chosen character token & the chosen alignment.
otherNightReminder: The Hypnotist chooses a player & a character & alignment. Put the Hypnotist to sleep. Wake the target. Show the *YOU ARE* token & the chosen character token & the chosen alignment.
